description: 62M post-MI on simvastatin (moderate-intensity). ACC/AHA secondary prevention recommends high-intensity statin upgrade. No USPSTF actions — secondary prevention is out of USPSTF scope.

actions.label: Switch to high-intensity statin therapy (atorvastatin 40-80mg or rosuvastatin 20-40mg)
actions.rationale: ACC/AHA COR I, LOE A: patients with clinical ASCVD aged ≤75 should be on high-intensity statin therapy (≥50% LDL-C reduction). Patient is currently on simvastatin (moderate-intensity). Upgrade to atorvastatin 40-80mg or rosuvastatin 20-40mg.

actions.label: Continue blood pressure management
actions.rationale: Patient has hypertension (BP 134/82 on lisinopril). Ongoing BP control is important for secondary prevention.
